recent_projects.name: IDAMoles
recent_projects.summary: IDA Moles is a reverse analysis interface for IDA Pro 9.1. It controls decompilation, debugging, and other operations via standardized calls, returning POST-formatted results. It supports custom MCP server development to enhance reverse analysis efficiency and flexibility.
recent_projects.author: lyshark

recent_projects.summary: Stochtest is a Python library for performing assertions on stochastic functions using statistical methods.
